event: Severe pain in lower abdomen with tenderness
Surgery decided due to concern for intestinal ischemia
Full extent of small bowel had a purplish color and was edematous
Mesentery engorged with areas of ecchymosis
Surgery completed using a Bogota bag
Vascular malformation of the superior mesenteric artery found
Superior mesenteric artery and celiac trunk arise from a common trunk (celiacomesenteric trunk)
Twenty-four hours later, second laparotomy performed
Bowel loops regained their normal color
Bowel loops regained their normal mobility
Condition complex; never fully recovered from acidosis
